hero.subtitle: NixOS fleet management with built-in compliance. Reproducible. Self-hosted. Open source.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Four crises converge
problem.sovereignty_text: Jamf, Intune, AWX, AWS SSM make your infrastructure a dependency of a US cloud. Cloud Act exposure. Your ability to deploy depends on their availability.
problem.security_text: Traditional tools stack layers (antivirus, EDR, SIEM) that observe but never change system properties. Drift, persistence, unverified binaries.
problem.reproducibility_text: Ansible, Puppet describe actions to perform, not states to reach. The outcome depends on pre-existing state. Configuration drift is structurally inevitable.
problem.compliance_text: NIS2, DORA, ISO 27001, ANSSI BP-028: traceability, rapid recovery, supply chain security. Fines up to 10M euros. Personal liability for executives.
problem.callout: The audit gap: standard tools manage desired state but cannot prove actual state. Verifying that a system matches its policy requires a separate audit tool, a separate agent, and trust in the runtime. NixFleet closes this gap structurally.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title: Compliance by construction
solution.intro: NixFleet transforms NixOS's mathematical guarantees into an enterprise fleet management platform. Not compliance as an afterthought. Compliance as a consequence of the architecture.
solution.nix_text: Single mkHost API to declare an entire fleet. Standard NixOS, no proprietary DSL. If you leave, your configuration works without us.
solution.cp_text: Fleet state, rollout orchestration (canary, staged, all-at-once), full audit trail. mTLS + API key authentication.
solution.agent_text: Pull model on each host. State machine with health checks and automatic rollback on failure. Works even if the control plane is temporarily down.
solution.compliance_text: 16 control modules, enforce + prove pattern. Automatic evidence collection. Works with or without the rest of NixFleet.

cta.title: Start with a free pilot
cta.subtitle: Deploy NixFleet on 5-10 machines. We do the audit and setup. You get compliant infrastructure.
